name: Fall Lamb and Vegetable Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and chop tomatoes.
2. Slice summer squash and zucchini.
3. Dice potatoes.
4. Place lamb and vegetables in crockpot.
5. Mix salt, garlic, thyme, and bay leaf into chicken stock; pour over lamb and vegetables.
6. Cover and cook on low for 8 hours (do not lift the lid to avoid prolonging cooking time).
7. Turn the setting to high.
8. Blend flour and butter together until small balls form.
9. Drop the balls into the stew and stir several times until thickened.
10. Serve over hot noodles or rice.
